title: alyssum fastigiatum
intro: Alyssum fastigiatum, also known as Four-winged Alyssum or Four-winged Madwort, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Alyssum fastigiatum is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers are used as a garnish or added to salads for their sweet, honey-like flavor.
